content_body:
Trying to plan the perfect honeymoon? Look no further! Blue Ridge is the ideal spot to get away from it all and focus on being with your new spouse. The town's mix of adventure and relaxation is sure to make your honeymoon one that you will never forget! Below are just a handful of great things to try as part of your honeymoon in Blue Ridge!

 

1. Hire a Private Chef to make Breakfast for Two

Start your days off with a delicious breakfast prepared in right in your cabin! Sister's Kitchen offers in-home meal preparation for any special occassion, and what's more special than your honeymoon? They will plan multiple courses, shop for the necessary groceries, set up the table, and clean up when they're done! 

 

2. Combine Horseback Riding or Hiking with a Couple's Massage

Make your honeymoon the perfect mix of outdoor adventure and relaxation. Teatree's Boutique Spa offers various packages of follow-up massages after guided hikes for two, horseback riding, ziplining, and more! You'll enjoy connecting with each other, as well as Mother Nature.

 

3. Go Wine Tasting

Spend a leisurely day touring our local wineries. They offer a perfect romantic ambiance for you and that special someone. 

 

 

4. Enjoy Dinner on the River

Enjoy a romantic dinner for two right along the river! Toccoa Riverside Restaurant creates the perfect relaxing atmosphere with a gorgeous river view as the backdrop. 

 

5. Catch a Flick at Swan Drive-In Theater

Go old-school and catch a drive-in flick at Swan Drive-In Theater—one of only three drive-in theaters in Georgia. It's the perfect way to put a fun spin on the old dinner-and-a-movie routine. Showing new releases every weekend, this old-fashioned gem is perfect for a one-of-a-kind honeymoon. Call 706-632-5235 

6. Hike to see Gorgeous Waterfalls

Make your honeymoon a memorable one by seeing beautiful, fully flowing waterfalls! Blue Ridge has plenty of fantastic hikes that lead to beautiful falls. 

 

7. Relax back at the Cabin

There is plenty to do out and about in the town of Blue Ridge, but sometimes the most fun can be had just spending quality time back at the cabin. Cuddle by a roaring fire, or relax and watch the sunset on the deck.
title: Romantic Honeymoon in Blue Ridge, GA
